title: Minor tweaks / additions to the "Updates" feature
excerpt:

-As it stands, we can quick select “Tomorrow at 9:00AM” or “Monday at 9:00AM” 
Something that would be helpful in my team is for it to be more like scheduled emails for Gmail or Outloo…

posts.author: Kim3 (Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

  1. RE: Scheduled Updates
    -As it stands, we can quick select “Tomorrow at 9:00AM” or “Monday at 9:00AM”
    Something that would be helpful in my team is for it to be more like scheduled emails for Gmail or Outlook.
    Ex: When I choose a custom time for one email and set it to schedule, the very next email I attempt to schedule will then add in the option to schedule it at my last selected time/date.
    -Sometimes I need a bunch of updates to go out on Wednesday at 12pm, it’s tedious to continuously select custom time over and over and over. Though I adore the scheduled updates feature, it just needs a bit more love.

What are you trying to achieve

With my suggested additions, I’m trying to achieve a quicker turn around in the updates feature. I work fast - sometimes my brain goes faster than my fingers can type.
There are a lot of AMAZING features on Monday.com that give that sense of one click and done. I think there are ways we can add that into the update feature. It’s a big part of my company. We document / take notes on everything. We even enforce what we call an “update minimum” where members of our team have to meet a quota and perform a certain amount of updates per week on their files.
